headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 3, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees secured a 9-4 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Ryan Weathers earning the win after 5.0 innings of work. Cody Bellinger led the Orioles' offense with 4 hits, including 2 home runs and 4 RBIs. The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Minnesota Twins, securing an 11-4 victory, led by Brandon Valenzuela's home run and 3 RBIs. The Cleveland Guardians routed the Athletics 14-6, with Shea Langeliers going 3 for 5 with 2 home runs and 3 RBIs.

Several key players have been sidelined due to injuries. Will Wilson, the Seattle Mariners' third baseman, has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a left thumb fracture, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026. Other notable injuries include Cole Sands (Minnesota Twins, right forearm strain), Matt Brash (Seattle Mariners, right lat inflammation), Ryan Helsley (Baltimore Orioles, right elbow inflammation), Brandon Woodruff (Milwaukee Brewers, right shoulder inflammation), Kyle Backhus (Philadelphia Phillies, left elbow inflammation), Luis Robert Jr. (New York Mets, lumbar spine disc herniation), and Brandon Williamson (Cincinnati Reds, left shoulder fatigue).

Several trades and roster moves have taken place. Zack Short has been traded to the Detroit Tigers in exchange for cash, while the Washington Nationals traded him away. The Toronto Blue Jays traded Tyler Fitzgerald to the Los Angeles Dodgers for cash and acquired Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers in a separate deal. The Seattle Mariners traded Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for Ty Cummings.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 9-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 9-4 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Ryan Weathers earning the win after 5.0 innings of work. Cody Bellinger led the Orioles' offense with 4 hits, including 2 home runs and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Blast Past Twins 11-4**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Minnesota Twins, securing an 11-4 victory. Brandon Valenzuela led the Blue Jays' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks were defeated by the Chicago Cubs with a final score of 0-2. Ian Happ led the Cubs' offense with a 3-hit performance, including a home run and an RBI.

top_news.title: **Cleveland Guardians Rout Athletics 14-6**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians dominated the Athletics in a lopsided victory, securing a 14-6 win. Shea Langeliers led the Athletics' offense with a strong performance, going 3 for 5 with 2 home runs and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mariners' Will Wilson Sidelined with Thumb Fracture**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners third baseman Will Wilson has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left thumb fracture, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Short Heads to Detroit in Trade**
top_news.summary: Zack Short has been traded to the Detroit Tigers in exchange for cash. The move comes as part of a recent trade involving the Washington Nationals.
